segments.text: Quick counterattack punishing the careless opening!
segments.original_text: いきなり油断したところに飛び出すような反撃

segments.text: Avoids the hazard just in time!
segments.original_text: 消火栓回避を間に合わせ

segments.text: Can grab the ledge off the spring, but...
segments.original_text: バネで崖をつかめるが

full_text: Quick counterattack punishing the careless opening! He's building speed now! Avoids the hazard just in time! Right down here Can grab the ledge off the spring, but... Fair! That tech

corrections.original: パワーエースでガキをつかめるが
corrections.corrected: バネで崖をつかめるが
corrections.rule: Sonic move name + kanji homophone (ガキ→崖)
move abbreviation (くうまえ→くちまえ)
